title: APN Idle Go Live receipt
description: The receipt emitted by the atomic Go Live checkpoint (ADR-0008, plan v2 §PR-1). One receipt per claimed boundary; re-calling on the same checkpoint returns the same receipt (idempotent). Declared here per the PR-0 RECONCILIATION deferral (receipt shape → PR-1). `qa/check-go-live.mjs` validates every emitted receipt against this contract.

schema.description: Discriminator marking this object as a Go Live receipt.

version.description: Receipt-shape version. Bumped only when the receipt fields change.

checkpointId.description: Stable id for the claimed checkpoint (default `gl-z<boundaryZone>`). Two calls with the same id resolve to the same receipt — the idempotency key.

boundaryZone.description: Route zone of the boundary this checkpoint was minted from (first at zone 10, then every 20).

goLiveCount.description: Total Go Live checkpoints claimed after this one (1-based).

notesBanked.description: Unshipped Notes folded into this checkpoint before conversion.

repGained.description: Rep minted from notesBanked at this checkpoint.

repTotal.description: Permanent Rep balance after the checkpoint applied.

cycleContribution.description: Rep-denominated cycle contribution that fed the Live Mult gain (migration may supply a legacy value).

liveGain.description: Live Mult increment added by this checkpoint.

liveMult.description: Live Mult after the checkpoint applied.

completedPackIds.description: Game Pack ids completed during the cycle. Empty until the Echo archive lands (PR-6); minItems 0 so the reference implementation's default `[]` validates.

nextPackIds.description: Upcoming Game Pack ids after the checkpoint. Empty until the Echo archive lands (PR-6); minItems 0.

ts.description: Epoch milliseconds the receipt was minted.

migration.description: Optional §7.6 migration marker — present only on the first checkpoint claimed from a migrated save, recording the version migrated from. Absent on native checkpoints.
